summary: AO Farms Dairy/Milk Management System — staff-only login via Internet Identity, farm-themed UI. Modules: Dashboard (6 summary cards + 7-day milk chart + recent entries), Cattle (add/edit/delete + active/inactive toggle), Milk Production, Inventory (low stock alerts), Customers (add/edit/delete + active/inactive toggle), Deliveries. Build has repeatedly failed due to scope/complexity limits.
architectural_notes: Build repeatedly fails when attempting full app in one shot — incremental/phased build approach recommended
Project name: AO Farms; branding uses green header, beige/cream background, cow logo
known_issues: Repeated build failures (20+ attempts) likely due to prompt/scope complexity exceeding AI generation limits
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Illustrated farm landscape banner with red barn on left, green trees, rolling mountains, and warm sunrise sky in a flat/cartoon style (farm-hero-banner.dim_1400x300.png)
- AO Farms logo: green cartoon cow head with horns inside a circular badge with 'A.O. Farms' text below in dark green on transparent background (ao-farms-logo.dim_120x80.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a top navigation bar with the AO Farms logo (green cow head icon + 'A.O. Farms' text) on the left, and navigation links: Dashboard, Cattle, Milk Production, Inventory, Customers, Deliveries. The active link should use a filled dark-green pill/button style. Navigation should route to existing app routes.

Add a full-width hero banner below the nav bar on the Dashboard page showing an illustrated farm landscape (barn, trees, mountains, sunrise sky) with the text 'Welcome to AO Farms' and subtitle 'Here's your dairy farm overview for today' overlaid on the left side of the image.

Display 6 summary stat cards on the Dashboard in a single row: (1) Total Cattle — count + active count subtext, (2) Today's Milk — total litres, (3) Inventory Items — total tracked items, (4) Low Stock — items below threshold of 10, (5) Today's Deliveries — logged today, (6) Missed Deliveries — not delivered today. Each card has a label, numeric value, subtext, and a small icon. Cards use a light beige/cream background with green icon accents.

Add a '7-Day Milk Production' line/area chart on the Dashboard (left panel) showing daily milk totals for the last 7 days using existing MilkProductionTrendChart component or equivalent Recharts line chart.
Add a 'Recent Milk Entries' panel on the Dashboard (right panel) listing the most recent milk production log entries with cattle tag, date, and volume. Show an empty state if no records exist.

Apply a consistent farm-themed visual style across all pages: beige/cream (#f5f0e8 or similar) page background, dark green (#1a5c2a or similar) primary color for nav, buttons, and accents, warm white card backgrounds, earthy tones for text. Use the existing CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css where possible.

new_feature_requests.summary: Staff-only login via Internet Identity (no public access)
AO Farms UI — green header, farm hero banner, cow logo, beige background
Dashboard with 6 summary cards, 7-day milk production chart, recent milk entries
Cattle management — add/edit/delete with active/inactive status toggle
Milk Production — log and track daily milk entries per cattle
Inventory — stock management with low stock alerts (threshold 10)
Customer management — add/edit/delete with active/inactive status toggle
